---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open VS Code with the Out-of-Code Insights extension installed
2. ...
3. ...
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened? Include any error messages shown.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| VS Code version | (e.g. 1.95.0 -- Help > About) |
| Extension version | (e.g. 1.0.17 -- Extensions panel > Out-of-Code Insights) |
| Operating system | (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14.4, Ubuntu 22.04) |
| Node version | (`node --version` in a terminal) |

## Logs / Screenshots

If applicable, paste relevant output from the VS Code Developer Console (Help > Toggle Developer Tools > Console tab). Redact any sensitive information (API keys, file paths containing personal data) before posting.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem -- related settings, workspace configuration, or steps you already tried.
